1|# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
   2|import pandas as pd
   3|import os
   4|
   5|# 设置文件路径
   6|employees_path = r'd:\项目类\CLI_lite应用\test_data\test_employees.xlsx'
   7|sales_path = r'd:\项目类\CLI_lite应用\test_data\test_sales.csv'
   8|output_path = r'd:\项目类\CLI_lite应用\data\output\commission_analysis.md'
   9|
  10|# 读取数据
  11|try:
  12|    df_employees = pd.read_excel(employees_path)
  13|    df_sales = pd.read_csv(sales_path)
  14|except Exception as e:
  15|    print(f"读取文件错误: {e}")
  16|    exit(1)
  17|
  18|# 打印数据结构以便调试
  19|print("=== 员工数据 ===")
  20|print(f"列名: {list(df_employees.columns)}")
  21|print(df_employees.head())
  22|print(f"\n=== 销售数据 ===")
  23|print(f"列名: {list(df_sales.columns)}")
  24|print(df_sales.head())
  25|
  26|# 确定关键列名
  27|# 假设员工数据有 '姓名' 和 '部门' 和 '薪资' 列
  28|# 销售数据有 '销售人员' 列
  29|# 如果列名不同，需要调整
  30|emp_name_col = '姓名' if '姓名' in df_employees.columns else df_employees.columns[0]
  31|emp_dept_col = '部门' if '部门' in df_employees.columns else df_employees.column

node_16.name: read_file: read_file
node_16.result:
1|# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
   2|import pandas as pd
   3|import os
   4|
   5|# 设置文件路径
   6|employees_path = r'd:\项目类\CLI_lite应用\test_data\test_employees.xlsx'
   7|sales_path = r'd:\项目类\CLI_lite应用\test_data\test_sales.csv'
   8|output_path = r'd:\项目类\CLI_lite应用\data\output\commission_analysis.md'
   9|
  10|# 读取数据
  11|df_employees = pd.read_excel(employees_path)
  12|df_sales = pd.read_csv(sales_path)
  13|
  14|print(f"员工数据: {len(df_employees)}人")
  15|print(f"销售数据: {len(df_sales)}条订单")
  16|print(f"员工列表: {df_employees['姓名'].tolist()}")
  17|
  18|# 计算各部门平均薪资
  19|avg_salary_by_dept = df_employees.groupby('部门')['薪资'].mean()
  20|print(f"\n各部门平均薪资:\n{avg_salary_by_dept}")
  21|
  22|# 将销售订单平均分配给销售人员
  23|employees_list = df_employees['姓名'].tolist()
  24|dept_list = df_employees['部门'].tolist()
  25|n_employees = len(employees_list)
  26|
  27|# 为每条销售订单分配销售人员
  28|df_sales['销售人员'] = [employees_list[i % n_employees] for i in range(len(df_sales))]
  29|
  30|# 创建姓名到部门的映射
  31|name_to_d
